LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF KURO VENTURES, LLC'S MOTION TO LIFT STAY OF LITIGATION IS CONTINUED TO JULY 2, 2013 TO BE HEARD WITH DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: L. FISCELLA, COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN, CSR #6185

LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT ONE RINCON DEVELOPMENT, LLC'S MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION IS GRANTED. THE PARTIES AGREED TO ARBITRATE THIS DISPUTE IN THEIR PURCHASE AGREEMENT AND ALSO BY STIPULATION. THE ATTORNEY'S FEES CLAUSE IS ENFORCEABLE BECAUSE THIS ACTION DOES NOT INVOLVE A "CONSUMER ARBITRATION" WITHIN THE MEANING OF CCP 1284.3. IN ADDITION, KURO VENTURE'S RELIANCE ON CCP 1284.3 AND CCP 1281.2(C) TO AVOID ARBITRATION RUNS AFOUL OF THE FAA AND IS PREEMPTED. (AAA IS NOT A PARTY TO THIS ACTION AND MAY NOT BE INCLUDED IN THE FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: RICHARD KRAMER, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN, CSR # 6185

APPEARANCES - ATTY. ANDREW M. ZACKS OF ZACKS & FREEDMAN, TEL. NO. 956-8100 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. ANDREW AZAUMI OF MCKENNY LONG, TEL. NO. 356-4631 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - A R G U E D; The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT ONE RINCON DEVELOPMENT, LLC's Motion To Compel Arbitration is granted. The parties agreed to arbitrate this dispute in their purchase agreement and also by stipulation. The attorney's fees clause is enforceable because this action does not involve a "consumer arbitration" within the meaning of CCP 1284.3. In addition, Kuro Venture's reliance on CCP 1284.3 and CCP 1281.2(c) to avoid arbitration runs afoul of the FAA and is preempted. (AAA is not a party to this action and may not be included in the form of order.) Judge: Richard Kramer, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/RAK)
